mnemonics.title: Parents Get Ready First
mnemonics.content: Parents Get Ready First: Parents (superclass) must be ready before children (subclasses) can be built.

mnemonics.title: Grandma Prepares Snacks
mnemonics.content: Grandma Prepares Snacks: Grandparent constructor, Parent constructor, Child instance block, Child constructor.

mnemonics.title: Superheroes Initialize First
mnemonics.content: Superheroes Initialize First: Superclass initializes before subclass, Implicit super() call is made by the compiler if not specified explicitly.
